item.title: F-004a: Auto-Format Lists
item.intent: List auto-formatting is the first-keystroke wow moment — Enter continues the list, renumbering just works, indentation is always correct.
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-039 (Text Engine), FEAT-038 (Parser). Enter in list item continues with correct marker and indentation. Enter on empty list item ends the list. Ordered lists auto-renumber on add/remove/reorder. Nested lists auto-correct to 2 or 4 spaces (configurable in settings). Tab/Shift-Tab indent/outdent list items. Haptic feedback on continuation. Each operation is discrete undo step. Does NOT fire inside code blocks.
acceptanceCriteria: User types a list item and presses Enter — list continues with correct marker and indentation
Ordered lists auto-renumber when items added/removed/reordered
Each auto-format action is independently undoable with Cmd+Z
Enter on empty list item ends the list and removes the empty marker
Auto-format does NOT fire inside fenced code blocks
Tab indents a list item one level, Shift-Tab outdents
Performance: auto-format completes within same frame as keystroke on a 500-item list
